title: Cranked
description: Crank your framerate to the max.
body:
A modpack built to make Minecraft run at its best.

Out of the 32 mods installed, **29** of them are optimization mods.

All of Cranked's mods are client-side, so you can use it on any server.

Will be updated to the latest Minecraft version when possible.

Comes with Controlify, so the modpack is fully playable with no setup on a Steam Deck.

The screenshots below show the difference between Vanilla and Cranked Minecraft. Switching to Cranked resulted in a **334.78%** increase in framerate. 

**(*)** Screenshots of the frametime graph had weird dimensions because of how big the difference was, so they're in the gallery.

**Mileage will vary, with lower-end computers getting better performance and higher FPS (better computers will still benefit greatly, just maybe not 334.78%)**
![Screenshot of Vanilla Minecraft taken at spawn in a new world. F3 menu is displaying 23 fps.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3bcc0a328cc4feb4a9729625b1b39af159205fe.png)
![Screenshot of Cranked Minecraft taken at spawn in a new world. F3 menu is displaying 100 fps.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efbe6cb0571bd94673d33057b7138ed42a028d7e.png)
***i3-1115G4, 11th Gen Intel(R) UHD Graphics, 1 GB of RAM Allocated, render distance options set to 16 chunks***
